title: Whats the overall reaction to 20 in Japan
display_title: Whats the overall reaction to 20 in Japan
wikitext:
[]: What's the overall reaction to 2.0 in Japan? (NO SPOILERS)             Quote Post by TheWaffleCult » Fri Aug 14, 2009 4:17 pm Just wondering if anyone here who lives in Japan, or has some other connection, knows what the public's general view of 2.0 is? I've seen reviews and such, but I'm more interested in crowd reactions - on a scale of say, The Dark Knight to Transformers 2, how did 2.0 fare?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Aug 14, 2009 4:21 pm Funny. I'd be far more interested in reviews from Japan Maybe this thread could be about both?

[]:             Quote Post by TheWaffleCult » Fri Aug 14, 2009 4:26 pm Sure, if that's more convenient

[]:             Quote Post by NGERA » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:10 pm No idea about reviews but according to the latest NewType mag polls, ROE characters are popular. This is one of many perceptions though. [url]http://img148.imageshack.us/i/page147.jpg/[/url] Shinji is #1 for the males. Asuka is #1 while Rei is #2 for the females.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:50 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7397 The NewType polls though usually reflect what's new.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:56 pm Shinji & Rei were also in Newtype polls after 1.0, but good to hear.
